meta.name: claude-acp
meta.description: Claude Code tier: read-only ~/.claude (auth is via static CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN, no refresh cycle, so no write needed on the credentials file itself). Session-env and projects are scoped to the fleetops project hash specifically, not the whole ~/.claude/projects tree, to avoid exposing history from other repos this account has used Claude Code on. Uses its own /tmp/claude-1000 root via CLAUDE_CODE_TMPDIR - do not share this path with any other tier's profile.
